dsl_rule.translation_notes: Price decline >= 5% over 14 days represented as returns < -0.05 (decimal scale). Declining volume (vs 20-day avg at 50th percentile) approximated using vol_ratio_20 < 1.0 (below average volume). Entry confirms regime via close < sma_20. Exit logic uses OR to capture either +7% gain OR 7-day hold with stop-loss at 4%.

backtest_rule.reason: Price decline >= 5% over 14 days represented as returns < -0.05 (decimal scale). Declining volume (vs 20-day avg at 50th percentile) approximated using vol_ratio_20 < 1.0 (below average volume). Entry confirms regime via close < sma_20. Exit logic uses OR to capture either +7% gain OR 7-day hold with stop-loss at 4%.

source_rule_text: Buy stocks that have declined sharply on declining volume over a recent period, as the low volume indicates insufficient buyers for distressed sellers, creating a systematic tendency for mean reversion in the following period.
